name: codex-browser-recorder
description: Record one explicitly approved Codex Browser test flow to a private local WebM file.

interface.shortDescription: Record an approved Browser test flow to local WebM.
interface.longDescription: Records one explicitly approved Codex Browser test flow to a private, validated, audio-free VP8 WebM file on the local machine.
defaultPrompt: Use $record-browser to record one approved non-sensitive flow on a public HTTPS test page.
Use $record-browser to record one approved same-origin navigation flow to a private local WebM.
Use $record-browser to record one approved loopback development flow to a private local WebM.
